Lessons > 25. APIs and P2 (Yelp)

Agenda

  1. Practice using three of the modules that we have designed to help you with project 2 (located inside of the apis folder):
    • twilio
    • yelp
    • spotify
  2. Answer any questions you have.

Note

  • Appreciations: Take 30 seconds to thank someone from the course staff who helped you.
